facebook.caption: 4.8 stars. 1,147 reviews. At a café inside Sunset Town. Lotus Home & Cafe at 69 Positano, Phú Quốc is pulling numbers that most restaurants in the country would kill for. That rating doesn't happen by accident. Find it, sit down, order something. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the vibe at Lotus Home & Cafe, 69 Positano, Sunset Town. 1,147 people rated it 4.8 stars. The camera doesn't lie. Neither do the reviews.
